title: Spicy Smoked Mackerel onigiri with Saudi Arabian Flair
description: A unique fusion of Thai and Saudi Arabian flavors, combining the richness of mackerel with the smokiness of intensely smoked ingredients.
instructions: 2. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
3. Place the mackerel fillets on the prepared baking sheet.
4. Drizzle with coconut oil and sprinkle with smoked paprika.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes or until cooked through.
6. Meanwhile, prepare the onigiri rice according to package instructions.
7. Cut the cooked mackerel into small pieces.
8. Mix the mackerel with chopped Thai basil leaves, lime juice, chili flakes, garlic, and salt.
9. Spoon the mackerel mixture onto the onigiri rice.
10. Top with Saudi Arabian dates and serve immediately.
11. Garnish with additional Thai basil leaves, if desired.
